steps.title: Read the intersection
steps.content: For a graphed system, the solution is the point that lies on both lines: the intersection.

steps.title: Write the ordered pair
steps.content: The graph shows the two lines crossing at $(3,4)$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: $\left(3,4\right)$ is correct. The other three options may lie near one line, but they are not the point where both lines intersect.
